ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sentence (0-1) indicating the likelihood of duplication */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the sentence originated */,
  "sentence_text" TEXT /* Text content of the sentence */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., website, document, email) */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentence was ingested into the system */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the sentence */,
  "is_duplicate" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the sentence is a duplicate */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the sentence belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentence_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair of duplicate sentences */,
  "sentence1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first sentence in the pair */,
  "sentence2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second sentence in the pair */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two sentences (0-1) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis run that detected the pair */,
  "is_confirmed_duplicate" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the pair has been confirmed as a duplicate by a manual review */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the similarity detection algorithm */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the pair (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_sentence2_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence2_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_sentence1_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence1_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or identifier of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., website, document, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, reviewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis run */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., similarity, quality) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)
